preview_text:
The model rates Uzbekistan as the favorite at 46%, with DR Congo trailing at 24%. This represents a meaningful gap in assessed win probability, positioning the Central Asian side as more likely to claim three points on a neutral venue.

The model's draw probability of 30% is notably elevated, suggesting considerable competitive balance beneath the headline favorite. The spread between Uzbekistan's win chance and DR Congo's is substantial enough to separate clear favorite from underdog, yet the draw standing above one-quarter probability indicates the match has material potential for a stalemate result.

The market and Polymarket pricing diverge significantly from the model. Both sportsbook consensus and Polymarket favor DR Congo substantially — near 46% each — while crediting Uzbekistan with only 28%. The model and market are roughly 22 percentage points apart on DR Congo's chances and similarly misaligned on Uzbekistan. The dashboard does not adjudicate between these sources; the gap warrants attention from users assessing confidence in either forecast.
